task: feat: atualizar protocolo extensão VSCode ↔ Devon após migração Go (issue #34)

todos.title: Define JSON-RPC 2.0 types in internal/rpc/types.go — Request, Response, Event, SessionInfo structs
Implement Unix socket listener and server loop in internal/rpc/server.go — Serve(), Close(), socket path ~/.devon/rpc.sock
Implement method handlers in internal/rpc/handlers.go — sendPrompt, getSession, listSessions, interrupt, getStatus
Implement event broadcaster in internal/rpc/stream.go — subscribe to agent.Event channel, fan-out JSON-SSE to connected clients
Write table-driven tests for internal/rpc/server_test.go — connect/disconnect, method dispatch, error responses, concurrent clients
Write table-driven tests for internal/rpc/handlers_test.go — each RPC method with valid/invalid payloads, session not found, agent not running
Wire RPC server into cmd/devon/main.go — add `devon rpc` subcommand that starts the RPC server, integrates with agent lifecycle and TUI
Create vscode-extension/package.json — extension manifest with commands (Devon: Send Prompt, Interrupt, Resume Session) and activation events
Create vscode-extension/tsconfig.json and .vscodeignore — TypeScript compilation config and packaging ignore rules
Create vscode-extension/src/types.ts — shared interfaces for RPC request/response, session info, event types mirroring Go types
Create vscode-extension/src/client.ts — JSON-RPC 2.0 client over Unix socket (net.connect) with connect, send, subscribe, disconnect methods
Create vscode-extension/src/commands.ts — command palette handlers: Devon: Send Prompt (quick input → client.sendPrompt), Devon: Interrupt, Devon: Resume Session
Create vscode-extension/src/events.ts — event streaming handler that subscribes to client events and dispatches to webview panels (tool calls, turn_done, error)
Create vscode-extension/src/indicators.ts — gutter decorations tracking file_change events from stream, adding M/A/D gutter indicators in editor
Create vscode-extension/src/extension.ts — activate() that instantiates client, registers commands, starts event stream, creates status bar item
Write tests for vscode-extension/src/test/suite/client.test.ts — mock socket, verify JSON-RPC framing, reconnect behavior
Write tests for vscode-extension/src/test/suite/extension.test.ts — activation, command registration, indicator lifecycle, event dispatch
Run go build ./... + go test ./... + go vet ./... until green for all internal/rpc/ changes
